commands.review_summary:
The PR routes sessions_history, sessions_list message hydration, and transcript last-message previews through a new visible-chat projection that hides tool artifacts, raw delivery mirrors, and terminal send confirmations while preserving includeTools raw output.

PR surface: Source +139, Tests +167. Total +306 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main preserves standalone delivery-mirror rows, while the PR helper filters them after projection, so bounded history/list surfaces can lose delivered text without needing a live checkout mutation.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor follow-up because the patch has a visible-history message-loss finding and the external contributor proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix: project visible session transcripts
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Visible WhatsApp/group session surfaces were showing internal delivery artifacts as if they were user-visible chat history. On `agent:alfred:whatsapp:group:120363425559039020@g.us`, `sessions_history(includeTools=false)` exposed delivery-mirror assistant copies, assistant tool-call-only rows, and terminal source-delivery confirmations like `Sent the Branch Basics links in WhatsApp.` `sessions_list(includeLastMessage=true)` also used those confirmations as previews.

This PR keeps raw transcript records intact for replay/debugging and `includeTools=true`, while projecting a cleaner visible chat transcript for history/list/preview surfaces.

## Summary

- Backstop WhatsApp message-tool finals so source-delivery terminal confirmations do not become the visible chat answer.
- Add shared visible-chat transcript projection helpers.
- Hide delivery mirrors, tool-call/tool-result artifacts, and terminal source-delivery confirmations from visible WA/group history and previews.
- Preserve raw transcript records and `includeTools=true`/debug paths.

## Evidence

Local verification on branch `fix/koro-whatsapp-message-tool-final` at `89d7eb9437`:

- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-history-tool.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts` passed: gateway shard 6 files / 444 tests; agents shard 2 files / 40 tests.
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts` passed: 1 file / 9 tests.
- `git diff --check` exited clean.

## MC

- Implements MC task `js7chanc5ewxg2jwf6aqwbmdt989g9fj`.
- Keep MC open until this PR is merged to `origin/main` and verified there.
target.author: henryyuen168-ship-it
